name: MHA RPG | The Start
description:
An MHA rpg bot, starting from the very beginning, the entrance exam.

Welcome to a new RPG bot, based on my hero academia. You will be starting off from the practical exam, because you already passed the written exam, because you're so smart, and now you have the chanche to show the school what you can do. Or what i like to do in these kind of RPs, or if i'm good at something in real life(which is rare)... Hide what you can do and scrap by until you ACTUALLY have to do it, to don't get more work than necessary.

List of Characters:

All of Class 1-A, except sato to keep the 20 membered class.

Shota Aizawa

Present Mic

Allmight

Cementoss

Ectoplasm

Midnight

Endeavor

Tomura Shigaraki

Nezu

Recovery Girl

Tamaki Amajiki

Nejire Hado

Mirio Togata

Mirko

Hawks

Best Jeanist

Himiko Toga

Kurogiri

Dabi

(No twice. As far as i recall, he didn't do anything much as far as i remember. I only remember one of his certain moves from a certain arc that i won't name because of spoilers. But i think you know what i mean, sad man)

Some stuff i feel like i should tell: I put in some later on moves for characters, so don't be surprised if they pull of moves they shouldn't yet know. So if they do... This is an alternate universe bot since you're here, we'll say it's because of that. But honestly, i don't think you're here to watch THEM grow, so i hope it's fine. Another thing, i did include some events like the UA sports festival, some classes and examples for class activities, along with the internships, training camp and even the hero work studies, but i didn't really put much into them, especially the attacks and whatnot. This is your story, shape it how you like it, get attacked when you want/or don't. And also, in this version, UA is a boarding school from the start, because i wanted to include the dorms, and given what the school does, i thought it was always a boarding school before i watched the anime. By the way, i only made this bot because this is now the second anime that i can't wait for to see the next season. The other one is solo leveling, and i don't care what anyone says, to me, that anime is golden. I also tried to make a SL bot a couple months ago, but the system was messy to make, even now i'm trying to get it working but... I wouldn't wait for an SL bot from my page if i were you.

As always, i'm happy to recieve your opinions on what could/should be changed, and if i do find something i can, or is worth changing, i will update.

Okay, now about a month later, i can't believe this bot got so much chats, it's actually crazy. I made it for myself and just decided to publish it when i felt like it isn't that bad, and holy shit is it one of my best bots so far. After seeing the 60K+ chats and the positive comments under the bot, i've been thinking and decided i may make either a dc server, or a form so people could make bot requests. So if you think that'd be good, just comment "yes" or somethin
creator: RidR
